name: Countly
tagline: Countly will only work over HTTPS, so please enable it. | Product Analytics for Mobile, Web, Desktop and IoT | https://count.ly
description:
Countly will only work over HTTPS, so please enable it. | Product Analytics for Mobile, Web, Desktop and IoT | https://count.ly


_Template derived from caprover/one-click-apps (caprover@bd357c9, Apache-2.0). Default credentials are generated per-app — check the compose environment values._
docker_compose:
services:
  countly:
    image: countly/countly-server:19.08.1
    volumes:
      - countly-data:/var/lib/mongodb
    restart: unless-stopped
    environment: {}
    ports:
      - 42019:80
volumes:
  countly-data: null
